infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: SafeHer uses your location to send SOS alerts and show nearby help centers.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: SafeHer uses background location while live sharing is active so trusted contacts can follow your route during emergencies.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: SafeHer needs photo access so you can attach incident evidence.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: SafeHer uses the camera so you can save visual evidence in your private vault.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: SafeHer uses the microphone so you can save audio evidence in your private vault.
infoPlist.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: SafeHer uses Face ID or Touch ID to protect your private evidence vault.

plugins.microphonePermission: Allow SafeHer to record private evidence audio.
